common.thisActionCannotBeUndone: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently remove the data from our servers.

domains.title: Custom Domains
domains.subtitle: Manage your short link domains
domains.noDomains: No domains yet. Add your first custom domain to get started!
domains.addCnamePrompt: Add this CNAME record to your DNS:
domains.addTxtPrompt: Add this TXT record to your DNS:
domains.uploadFilePrompt: Upload this file to your domain:
domains.howToUseDesc1: Custom domains allow you to create short links with your own domain, such as
domains.howToUseDesc2: After adding a domain, you'll need to verify it by adding DNS records or uploading a verification file. Once verified, you can use it when creating new short links.
domains.howToUseDesc3: The same short code can be used with different domains, so you can have multiple domains pointing to different links.
domains.addSuccess: Domain added! Please verify it using the instructions below.
domains.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this domain?

qr.title: Scan to Open

home.title: Smarter Link Management
home.subtitle: Professional platform for short link generation, click tracking, and data analysis.
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage and share your links

features.trackingDesc: Detailed click statistics including geographic location, device, and source.
features.domainsDesc: Use your own domain to enhance brand trust.
features.securityDesc: Enterprise-grade encryption and access control for data security.

tenantMgmt.noTenants: No tenants yet. Create one to get started.

tenantMgmt.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

memberMgmt.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

verify.title: Security Gateway
verify.subtitle: For anti-phishing security, this link is now encrypted. Please scan the QR code below with your mobile device to proceed.
